The following events took place in '''89 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Ferroan]]s settle on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]].<ref name="Rogue Planet">''[[Rogue Planet]]''</ref>
*[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Thame Cerulian]] takes [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] learner.<ref name="LOTJ">''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]''</ref>
*[[Lorian Nod]] is expelled from the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].<ref name="LOTJ" />
*A settlement is established on [[Eol Sha]] by entrepeneurs intending to use [[ramjet mining ship]]s to gather valuable gases from the nearby [[Cauldron Nebula/Legends|Cauldron Nebula]].<ref name="JASB" />
*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] expedition charts [[Abonshee]]. {{Circa}}<ref name="Godling">{{WEGCite|story=Tests of the Godking|book=Star Wars Campaign Pack}}</ref>

==Births==
*[[Grubber Vapps]] {{Circa}}<ref name="BL">{{GamerCite|7|Bartyn's Landing (article)}}</ref>
